tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: test_subagent_uses_active_registry writes and runs a vitest test that actually imports and calls resolvePluginTools, sets up mocks, and verifies behavioral outcomes (tools returned, mock not called). test_repo_oxlint and test_repo_plugins_unit run actual compilation/test commands. While test_active_registry_import and test_resolve_tools_delegates_registry are text-based, the behavioral test provides genuine execution-based verification.

test_not_tautological.reason: The vitest behavioral test mocks resolveRuntimePluginRegistry to return undefined and sets an active registry, then verifies tools are returned from the active registry. A stub resolvePluginTools returning [] would fail because it asserts tools.map(t => t.name) equals ['optional_tool']. The base commit code also fails because it calls the mocked loader (which returns undefined) instead of using the active registry.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three behaviors described in instruction.md's 'Expected Behavior' section are tested: (1) importing getActivePluginRegistry (test_active_registry_import), (2) reusing active registry when allowGatewaySubagentBinding is true (test_subagent_uses_active_registry), (3) not calling resolveRuntimePluginRegistry directly (test_resolve_tools_delegates_registry).
